source_verification_note: Savings ranges (p10/p50/p90) are calibrated from consulting engagements. industry_sources entries cite real published works that directionally support each lever's savings thesis.

levers.description: Reduce reliance on high-cost subcontractors by insourcing roles into lower-cost India delivery centres; renegotiate retained subcontracts.
industry_sources: NASSCOM Strategic Review 2025 (nasscom.in) — subcontracting 6-10% of IT services revenue; insourcing saves 30-50% per FTE equivalent
TCS FY25 Annual Report (BSE 532540) — subcontracting at 5% of revenue represents best-in-class benchmark vs sector median 8-9%
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — savings range calibrated from 5 IT services sourcing reviews in India

levers.description: Rebalance workforce pyramid: increase fresher/entry-level ratio, implement structured upskilling to reduce dependence on lateral hires at senior grades.
industry_sources: NASSCOM Strategic Review 2025 — fresher intake 50-60% of annual hiring in tier-1 IT; cost 30-40% lower than lateral equivalent
Infosys FY25 Annual Report (BSE 500209) — fresher onboarding and pyramid management cited as key margin lever
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — pyramid rebalancing savings calibrated from 6 India IT workforce transformation engagements

levers.description: Structured interventions: manager quality scoring, career pathing, competitive compensation benchmarking, targeted retention bonus for critical skills.
industry_sources: NASSCOM Strategic Review 2025 — cost of attrition in IT: 6-12 months salary per departure including recruitment, ramp-up, lost revenue
TCS FY25 Annual Report — attrition at 13.3% cited as best-in-class; every 1pp reduction saves ~0.5% of revenue
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — attrition savings range from HR analytics engagements at 4 Indian IT firms

levers.description: Consolidate internal data centres to public cloud; eliminate redundant software licences; implement FinOps discipline for cloud cost management.
industry_sources: Gartner IT Key Metrics 2024 (gartner.com) — IT services firms reducing internal infra cost 20-30% via cloud migration + FinOps
Infosys FY25 Annual Report — internal cloud transformation cited as cost driver; similar programmes at TCS, HCL
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — cloud rationalisation savings calibrated from 5 IT services IT modernisation engagements

levers.lever_name: Real Estate Rationalisation via Hybrid Work
levers.description: Implement seat-sharing and hybrid work policy (50-60% seat utilisation target). Exit high-cost leases in CBD; consolidate to campus model.
industry_sources: NASSCOM 2025 — post-COVID hybrid work in IT: 60-70% of employees in hybrid; seat utilisation 45-55% reducing space needs
Wipro FY25 Annual Report (BSE 507685) — facilities rationalisation contributing to margin improvement
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — real estate savings calibrated from 4 IT sector lease restructuring mandates

levers.description: Implement self-booking tools, policy compliance enforcement, preferred supplier agreements for hotels/flights, video-first for short-duration client engagements.
industry_sources: Infosys FY25 Annual Report — T&E at 1.8% of revenue; best-in-class IT firms 1.5% (TCS)
Gartner 2024 — travel policy compliance programmes reduce T&E 15-25% without service delivery impact
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — T&E optimisation savings from 5 India IT travel management engagements

levers.description: Shift from events/analyst relations spend to digital marketing. Introduce marketing attribution to eliminate low-ROI spend. AI-assisted content at scale.
industry_sources: NASSCOM 2025 — India IT firms allocating 1-2.5% of revenue to S&M; digital-first approaches reduce cost while maintaining pipeline
Gartner CMO Survey 2024 — digital marketing delivers 40-60% better cost-per-lead vs. events/trade shows
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — marketing efficiency savings calibrated from 3 IT sector marketing transformation engagements

levers.description: Benchmark and rationalise group health insurance premiums via competitive RFP; introduce wellness programmes to reduce claims; review D&O and E&O coverage limits.
industry_sources: IRDAI Annual Report 2023-24 (irdai.gov.in) — group health insurance competitive market; 15-25% premium reduction achievable via RFP
NASSCOM 2025 — IT sector health insurance claims ratio 80-95%; wellness programmes reduce claims 10-15%
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — benefits rationalisation savings from 4 IT sector HR benefits reviews

levers.description: Implement Vendor Management System (VMS) for contract staff; standardise rates; reduce rogue spend on contract labour outside preferred supplier list.
industry_sources: NASSCOM Strategic Review 2025 — contract workforce 15-25% of IT headcount; fragmented contracting leads to 15-20% rate premium vs. structured MSA
Gartner 2024 — VMS implementation reduces contingent spend 10-20% through rate standardisation and reduced agency mark-ups
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — contingent workforce governance savings from 3 IT sector workforce management engagements
